title: crepidophyllum humile
intro: Crepidophyllum humile is a plant species belonging to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly referred to as spikemoss due to its needle-like leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Crepidophyllum humile are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant are usually made by infusing its leaves in water or using them in teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
